hero.title: Healthcare overlooks women who experience violence.
hero.subtitle: We’re building what’s missing.

features.title: Clinical Care
features.description: Free, specialized physical and mental healthcare delivered through our affiliated medical practice, PurpLE Family Health.

features.title: Training & Technical Assistance
features.description: Working with clinicians and organizations to strengthen healthcare for survivors.

features.title: Research & Publications
features.description: Translating insights from clinical care into research and publications that improve healthcare for survivors.

secondarySection.title: Why GBV Healthcare Matters
secondarySection.description: 1 in 3 women experience gender-based violence (GBV), including domestic violence, sexual assault, and human trafficking.
